# Reference filenames for which sbol-rs and pySBOL3 produce different —
# but both spec-compliant — output. The cross_impl_pysbol3 test skips
# entries in this list. Each entry must be accompanied by a `#` comment
# block above it explaining the rationale and pointing at the spec
# section or upstream issue that permits the divergence.
#
# Format: one bare filename per line, e.g. `component.pySBOL3.expected.ttl`.
#
# No entries yet — populate as reference outputs are generated and
# divergences are diagnosed.
